headlines.headline: Crevex Labs completes planned facility upgrade in Southeast Asia

sentiment.reasoning: The completion of a facility upgrade is an operational milestone that should improve production efficiency over the coming months.

headlines.headline: Zelvel Capital names new head of digital payments division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has neutral immediate impact until strategic shifts are announced.

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs names new head of wireless connectivity division

sentiment.reasoning: Leadership changes in specific divisions are routine and generally do not signal immediate material financial shifts.

headlines.headline: Volval Devices reports record quarterly revenue, up 10% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 10% is a strong positive indicator of current demand and operational success.

headlines.headline: Volval Devices announces $4.1B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program directly benefits shareholders by increasing earnings per share and signaling management confidence.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
